Rivered 1.0 — June 2026

About River

A space built for
the game itself.

River is Bangalore's most considered poker room — a members-only environment where the craft of the game is taken seriously, and where the people around the table make every session worth attending.

From the professional-grade tables to the unhurried atmosphere, every detail is designed to let you play your best game. We're not a casino floor. We're a private room where relationships and reputations are built over time.

The River

Every hand,
a current.

01

The Pre-flop
— where it begins.

Every session starts the same way: two cards, a breath, a decision. River gives you the space to think clearly from the very first hand. No noise. No rush. Just the game.

02

The Flop
— the room reveals itself.

Three cards change everything. The table shifts. Reads are made. At River, the company around you is as carefully curated as the game — serious players who know what the flop means.

03

The Turn
— patience tested.

The fourth card. The moment the river inside you speaks. River was built for players who understand that this game is as much about stillness as it is about action.

04

The River
— where we live.

The fifth card. The final truth. This is where fortunes turn, legends are made, and stories begin. Every evening at River ends here — and every member knows exactly what that means.

The Room

Inside River

The Light Crafted warmth above every table.
The Sign Where the river begins to glow.
The Floor Ten tables. Perfect light. Your seat awaits.
The Moment Outside, the city. Inside, the game.
